_README: HO3 text-replacement map, finalized from the actual template text.
KEY = exact text in the template; VALUE = JotForm field name or token.
NOT listed here on purpose: the coverage tables, premium summary row,
and locations table on slides 4-5. Those reuse identical sample values
for different fields ($ 153,700, Chaucer, $ 500,000, EXCL...) and are
filled by column header in code (_fill_ho3_tables in
proposal_generator.py), which runs BEFORE this text pass.
Replacing 'FL' as text is also avoided deliberately - it would corrupt
the 'FL License #L106686' footer on every slide.
Note: 'Holly White' becomes the client name everywhere, including the
Named Insureds box on slide 2. If multiple named insureds are needed
there as separate lines, that box needs a structural fill like the
Auto template's - ask for it when it becomes a real need.
